findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:49 contains no craft-taxonomy terms (e.g., contraction/register/syntax language) and still clearly conveys Pike's deliberate formality through concrete phrasing; FAIL if analytic metadata vocabulary remains.
findings.problem: Process leakage and mechanical style-bible token reuse enter the narration ("low contraction"), which reads like calibration metadata instead of lived scene language and breaks immersion.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the narrator diagnosis at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:49 using observable speech texture and social effect rather than meta labels; keep the same characterization goal but ground it in audible diction and courtroom reaction in nearby beats (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:51).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:37-51 includes (1) at least one direct quoted challenge tied to the plea/sentence and (2) at least one concrete bodily/material consequence beat reacting to each ruling mentioned; FAIL if the passage remains predominantly docket-style recap without scene-level collision.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the most consequential accountability outcomes (Clay's plea reduction and Pike's light sentence) are rendered primarily as procedural summary blocks, which mutes the embodied social violence and narrative pressure at the exact point consequence should be most present.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:37-51, convert at least part of the legal-summary delivery into immediate scene conflict: add one on-record challenge and one physically specific response from harmed parties for Clay and/or Pike, while preserving legal facts already established in the paragraph.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised opening block (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:17-145) reads as one clear primary confrontation with visible setup-clash-consequence progression and at least one currently separate beat is materially condensed; FAIL if beats still read as sequential updates of similar narrative weight.
findings.problem: The opening movement stacks too many major beats (two plea outcomes, trust freeze, resignation, venture setup) in rapid succession, so dramatic hierarchy blurs and key reversals do not receive enough dwell time to land at Booker-level weight.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebalance snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:17-145 by selecting one institutional turning point as the anchor scene and compressing at least one secondary beat into shorter transition prose; use recovered space to deepen causal aftermath inside the chosen anchor scene.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the cited line no longer uses the template and the mother-daughter rupture still lands through concrete interaction detail; fail if the same simile skeleton remains.
findings.problem: Recurring full-book formula metaphor pattern appears across 6 chapters. REPLACE this chapter's instance.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6640 with chapter-specific emotional aftermath tied to Ida/Lena body language and burial environment, avoiding 'settle ... like ...' phrasing.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
